title: Le imperativo
summary: Give commands and make polite requests.

teach.note: The imperative is the infinitive minus -r, no pronoun: venir → veni.
Negate a command the same way as any verb: non before it.

grammar.title: Giving commands
grammar.body:
The imperative is just the infinitive with its **-r** dropped — no pronoun needed, one form for everyone you're talking to:
parlar → **Parla!** (Speak!), venir → **Veni!** (Come!), audir → **Audi!** (Listen!)
Negate it exactly like any other verb: **Non parla!** (Don't speak!).

teach.target: Da me le pan, per favor.
teach.roman: da me le pan per favor
teach.note: da = give (imperative of dar); me = me, the object form of io.

teach.target: Prende un pomo, si tu vole.
teach.roman: prende un pomo si tu vole
teach.english: Take an apple, if you want.
